message:
fix(tls): fail closed on missing close_notify per RFC 8446, suppress unused variable warnings

Two TLS fixes:

src/tls/stream.rs — Transport EOF without a TLS close_notify was silently
treated as a clean close via note_read_eof(). This violates RFC 8446 which
requires the close_notify alert before connection termination to prevent
truncation attacks. Now returns io::ErrorKind::UnexpectedEof with message
"tls connection closed without close_notify" — fail-closed behavior that
surfaces the protocol violation to the caller.

src/tls/connector.rs — Renames `added` to `_added` in SSL_CERT_FILE and
SSL_CERT_DIR loading paths to suppress unused variable warnings when the
tracing-integration feature is disabled. The variable is only read inside
cfg(feature = "tracing-integration") blocks, causing warnings in builds
without that feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
